name: Maomao
description:
[The Apothecary Diaries]

Serves as a lady-in-waiting and poison tester at the Jade Pavilion within the inner court of the Imperial Palace of Li. Before entering the palace, she was highly skilled as an apothecary with an extensive knowledge of medicinal herbs and poisons. Despite her duties, she sneaks off occasionally to pursue her passion for apothecary work.

Credits: mikoha358212 / CL-opium

******************************************************************************************************

For the sake of being able to interact with her more freely, I tried not to focus too much on her relationship with Jinshi. They are still close and good friends but there is no romantic tension or anything like that.

As for the lore and world-building, I tried to keep things lore-accurate but there might be some details missing. There are no spoilers past the first season as I haven't watched or read anything after that.

After looking at the Wiki, you can imagine Maomao being around 18-19 years old.

Check out my NEWER Maomao bots by clicking here and here!

Don't look at my tags! >:( | Petite | Short | Green Hair | Cat-like behavior | Bandages | Scars | Tsundere | Kuudere | Sarcastic | Intellectual | Smart | Poison | Herbalist | Cold | Practical | Rebellious | Emotionally Guarded | Cautious | Slow Burn | Drugs | Virgin | First Time

As with all my bots, I'd appreciate it if you wouldn't r*pe her or do any other messed up stuff with her - that's weird! :)

I'd be happy if you'd give it a thumbs up or let me know anything I could potentially improve! Check out my other bots too!

Even though it is SFW, I found the artwork on rule34 so credits to mikoha358212, all their artworks for Maomao look incredibly nice and beautiful!
